---
title: "No credible evidence for links between 2D:4D and COVID-19 outcomes: A probabilistic perspective on digit ratio, ACE variants, and national case fatalities"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Jaeger, B., & Schild, C."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "Early Human Development"
volume: "152"
pages: "105272"
doi: "10.1016/j.earlhumdev.2020.105272"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Jones_Schild_Jaeger_2021.pdf"
categories: [methodology, bayesian]
---
